name: bad-title

pull_request.title: Add change metadata checks
pull_request.body:
## Outcome
Make change metadata reviewable before merge.

## Change class and lifecycle
Governance experiment for the PR-G release-support node.

## Governing scope
Only repository-local pull-request metadata checks are affected.

## Design and changes
Add deterministic fixtures and a checker with no GitHub mutation.

## Evidence
### Baseline / falsifier
A legacy subject and incomplete body must be rejected.

### Verification
Run the governance test suite.

## Risks, assumptions, and exclusions
Hosted rules remain operator-owned.

## Recovery, maintenance, and reopen triggers
Revert if valid work is rejected.

## Review plan and dispositions
Independent review is required.

expected: pull request title must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits
